content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule in `geomconf_7446.xyz`, atom index 10 is a Carbon (C) atom. It is directly covalently bonded to three other atoms.

The neighbors are:
- Atom 9 (Nitrogen, N)
- Atom 11 (Oxygen, O)
- Atom 12 (Carbon, C)

Geomconf index: 7446

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 10 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
